content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COM?VIISSION
P.O. Box 807
• 428 J Street
. Sacramento, CA 958 12-0807
(916) 322-5660
• Fax (916) 322-0886
April 20, 1998
R. James Shaffer
Attorney at Law
16412 Sundancer Lane
Huntington Beach, California 92649
Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. 1-98-093
Dear Mr. Shaffer:
This letter is in response to your request for advice regarding the provisions ofthe
Political Reform Act (the “Act”).
1 Due to the hypothetical nature of your request, I have
attempted to contact you on several occasions by telephone and fax to obtain information
required to answer your questions, but have been unable to reach you. Therefore, I am closing
this file with no response.
Please feel free to contact me at (916) 322-5660, if you have any further questions.
Sincerely,
flctLt I•-t
Mary Ann Kvasager
Political Reform Consultant
Government Code sections 81000 - 91014. Commission regulations appear at title 2, sections 18109
-
18995, of the California Code of Regulations.

sections.question_synthetic: The requester sought advice regarding provisions of the Political Reform Act, but the specific legal question was not disclosed due to inability to establish contact.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The FPPC closed the file without providing a response due to the hypothetical nature of the request and inability to contact the requester for necessary clarifying information.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Declination/closure letter with no Q&A sections. The letter explicitly states the file is being closed without response due to hypothetical nature of request and failed contact attempts. No substantive legal analysis provided.

embedding.qa_text:
QUESTION: The requester sought advice regarding provisions of the Political Reform Act, but the specific legal question was not disclosed due to inability to establish contact.

CONCLUSION: The FPPC closed the file without providing a response due to the hypothetical nature of the request and inability to contact the requester for necessary clarifying information.
